visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing large black Sony headphones and a black cropped jacket over beige cargo pants, stands in a studio setting. A silver condenser microphone is positioned to her left. She holds a transparent water bottle and takes a drink while looking at the camera with a calm expression. (2) A hand enters from the right side of the frame, offering a small glass bottle of Kinmen Kaoliang Liquor. The woman takes the bottle, looking surprised and then intrigued. She begins to perform energetically, holding the small bottle and pointing it towards the camera while expressing high-energy facial emotions. (3) The woman continues her enthusiastic singing performance, gesturing broadly with both hands. She alternates between pointing at the camera, holding her chest, and waving her arms. Her facial expressions are highly animated, ranging from intense focus to joyful smiles. The background remains a consistent turquoise pleated curtain.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female performer fully visible, and 1 hand/partial figure visible briefly to deliver a bottle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair and bangs, wearing a black cropped zip-up jacket over a black graphic t-shirt and beige cargo pants. She wears professional black over-ear headphones.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional recording studio setup with a turquoise pleated fabric backdrop. A silver large-diaphragm condenser microphone with a black pop filter is mounted on a stand.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy rock drum beat accompanied by rhythmic electric guitar riffs. No vocals are present for the first few seconds, only the clean studio-processed musical background at a moderate BPM. (2) A powerful female vocal enters, singing with high arousal and a clear, melodic tone. The lyrics are in Hokkien. The intensity of the vocals matches the driving rock rhythm of the background music. There are no background noises, indicating a clean studio recording. (3) The vocal performance intensifies with higher pitch variability and stronger projection during the chorus sections. Toward the end, the vocalist transitions from singing to a celebratory shout and brief spoken call-to-action with high valence, while the electric guitar performs a melodic outro.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Performance -> Prop Introduction -> Climax -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a musical performance video featuring a young woman singing a rock cover of a popular song. The inclusion of a liquor bottle as a prop adds a humorous and relatable element to the high-energy performance, likely intended for social media engagement and entertainment.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The prominent placement and use of a specific brand of Kinmen Kaoliang Liquor as a primary prop in a studio performance video suggests a collaboration or endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A well-produced studio vocal performance with high arousal and strong synchronization between the vocalist's gestures and the rock music beat.
